backstory.original: The elder of Kir Sabal, Asharra is a stern and honorable aarakocra wizard who looks over her flock and the safety of the Omu royal family.
backstory.display: 身为克萨巴尔的长老，艾萨拉是一位严厉而可敬的翼爪鸟人法师，她维护着她的族群和奥穆王室的安全。

description.original: Asharra lets loose a barrage of missiles, hitting random targets.
description.display: 艾萨拉释放出魔法飞弹弹幕，攻击随机目标。

description.original: Asharra pushes back all enemies and casts a massive Fireball on a random one.
description.display: 艾萨拉击退所有敌人，并对随机目标施放一个大火球。

longDescription.original: Asharra leaps into the air, flapping her wings and pushing all enemies away from the party. Hovering there, she summons a massive fireball that hits a random enemy and all other enemies within a small radius.
longDescription.display: 艾萨拉跳到空中，挥动翅膀将所有敌人推离队伍。随后悬停在空中并召唤一个大火球，攻击一名随机敌人和小范围内的其他所有敌人。

description.desc: Increases the damage of Human Champions by $(amount)%.
人类勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Asharra forms a bond of friendship with the Human champions in your party, increasing their damage.
specializationDescription.display: 艾萨拉与队伍中的人类勇士结成友谊纽带，使其伤害提高。

tipText.original: Asharra has formed a bond of friendship with your Human champions. Focus on having those champions as your main damage dealers.
tipText.display: 艾萨拉与人类勇士结成友谊纽带，专注于使其成为主要伤害输出者。

description.desc: Increases the damage of Dwarven and Elven Champions (including Drow) by $(amount)%.
矮人与精灵（包括卓尔精灵）勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Asharra forms a bond of friendship with the Dwarf and Elf champions (including Drow and Eladrin) in your party, increasing their damage.
specializationDescription.display: 艾萨拉与队伍中的矮人及精灵勇士（包括卓尔精灵和雅灵）结成友谊纽带，使其伤害提高。

tipText.original: Asharra has formed a bond of friendship with your Dwarf and Elf champions (including Drow). Focus on having those champions as your main damage dealers.
tipText.display: 艾萨拉与矮人及精灵勇士（包括卓尔精灵）结成友谊纽带，专注于使其成为主要伤害输出者。

description.desc: Increases the damage of Aarakocra, Centaur, Dragonborn, Firbolg, Lizardfolk, Minotaur, Satyr, Tiefling, Tortle and Triton Champions by $(amount)%.
翼爪鸟人、半人马、龙裔、隐逸巨人、蜥蜴人、牛头人、半羊人、提夫林、龟人以及梭螺鱼人勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Asharra forms a bond of friendship with the Aarakocra, Centaur, Dragonborn, Firbolg, Lizardfolk, Minotaur, Satyr, Tiefling, Tortle and Triton champions in your party, increasing their damage.
specializationDescription.display: 艾萨拉与队伍中的翼爪鸟人、半人马、龙裔、隐逸巨人、蜥蜴人、牛头人、半羊人、提夫林、龟人以及梭螺鱼人勇士结成友谊纽带，使其伤害提高。

tipText.original: Asharra has formed a bond of friendship with your Aarakocra, Dragonborn, Firbolg, Lizardfolk, Minotaur, Tiefling, and Tortle champions. Focus on having those champions as your main damage dealers.
tipText.display: 艾萨拉与翼爪鸟人、龙裔、隐逸巨人、蜥蜴人、牛头人、提夫林以及龟人勇士结成友谊纽带，专注于使其成为主要伤害输出者。

description.pre: Increases the potency of each of Asharra's Bond abilties (separately) by $(not_buffed amount)% for every matching Bonded species in the party. Additionally, Asharra gains the effect of a given Bond if at least 4 Champions are affected by it
队伍中任何适用纽带技能的种族，都会为艾萨拉的相应纽带提升效力 $(not_buffed amount)%（单独计算）。另外，如果艾萨拉的某种纽带至少与 4 名勇士建立联系，则提升此纽带效果

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrades,100,90,91,92","description":"Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%."}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrades,200,90,91,92","description":"Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%."}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrades,200,90,91,92","description":"Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%."}

description.desc: Whenever the party is under attack, Asharra takes flight and increases her damage by $(not_buffed amount)% every 5 seconds, stacking multiplicatively up to 20 times
队伍成员遭受攻击时，艾萨拉飞离地面，并每 5 秒提升 $(not_buffed amount) % 自身伤害。能够以乘算方式堆叠最多 20 层

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrades,200,90,91,92","description":"Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%."}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrades,200,90,91,92","description":"Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%."}

description.desc: Increases the damage of Half-Elf, Half-Orc and Halfling Champions by $(amount)%.
使半精灵、半兽人和半身人勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Asharra forms a bond of friendship with any Half-Elf, Half-Orc and Halfling champions in your party, increasing their damage.
specializationDescription.display: 艾萨拉与队伍中的半精灵，半兽人和半身人勇士结成友谊纽带，使其伤害提高。

tipText.original: Asharra has formed a bond of friendship with your Half-Elf, Half-Orc and Halfling champions. Focus on having those champions as your main damage dealers.
tipText.display: 艾萨拉与半精灵，半兽人和半身人勇士结成友谊纽带，专注于使其成为主要伤害输出者。

description.desc: Increases the damage of Aasimar, Bullywug, Doppelganger, Genasi, Giff, Gith, Goliath, Harengon, Kalashtar, Saurial, Tabaxi, Thri-kreen, Warforged, Modron, and Yuan-ti Champions by $(amount)%.
使神裔、狂蛙人、变形怪、元素裔、吉夫人、吉斯人、巨人、兔人、卡拉史塔人、爬虫人、斑猫人、螳螂人、机关人、魔冢与蛇人勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Asharra forms a bond of friendship with any Aasimar, Bullywug, Doppelganger, Genasi, Giff, Gith, Goliath, Harengon, Kalashtar, Saurial, Tabaxi , Warforged, and Yuan-ti champions in your party, increasing their damage.
specializationDescription.display: 艾萨拉与队伍中的神裔、狂蛙人、变形怪、元素裔、吉夫人、吉斯人、巨人、兔人、卡拉史塔人、爬虫人、斑猫人、机关人及蛇人勇士结成友谊纽带，使其伤害提高。

tipText.original: Asharra has formed a bond of friendship with your Aasimar, Genasi, Gith, Goliath, Saurial, Tabaxi , Warforged, and Yuan-ti champions. Focus on having those champions as your main damage dealers.
tipText.display: 艾萨拉与神裔、元素裔、吉斯人、巨人、爬虫人、斑猫人、机关人及蛇人勇士结成友谊纽带，专注于使其成为主要伤害输出者。

description.desc: Increase the damage of NERDS and Small Champions by $(amount)%. (Small Champions are fairy, gnome, goblin, halfling, kender, kobold, and plasmoid Champions.)
使仙女、侏儒、地精、半身人、坎德人、狗头人、呆宝和等离子勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Asharra forms a bond of friendship with any Fairy, Gnome, Goblin, Halfling, Kender, Kobold, NERDS, and Plasmoid champions in your party, increasing their damage.
specializationDescription.display: 艾萨拉与你队伍中的任何侏儒、地精、仙女、半身人、坎德人、呆宝们和等离子勇士建立友谊羁绊，增加他们的伤害。

tipText.original: Asharra has formed a bond of friendship with your Fairy, Gnome, Goblin, Halfling, Kender, Kobold, NERDS, and Plasmoid champions. Focus on having those champions as your main damage dealers.
tipText.display: 艾萨拉与你的仙女、侏儒、地精、半身人、坎德人、呆宝人、狗头人和等离子冠军们结下了友谊。让这些勇士成为你的主要伤害输出者吧。

description.original: My enemies will rue the day they met me.
description.display: 我的敌人将为遇到我而后悔。

description.original: The fate of Kir Sabal is in my hands.
description.display: 克萨巴尔的命运就在我的手中。

description.original: I feel a special bond with you.
description.display: 我感到和你有种特殊的联系。

description.original: My people follow me. Will you?
description.display: 我的人民会追随我，你会吗？

description.original: Take flight, friends!
description.display: 快跑吧，朋友！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%.

description.original: I can be quite persuasive.
description.display: 我可以相当能言善辩。

description.original: Icewind Dale needs protectors!
description.display: 冰风谷需要守护者！

description.original: I'll provide air cover.
description.display: 我会提供空中掩护。

description.original: My ancestors watch over us. We must stand together now, for the fate of all.
description.display: 我们的祖先守护着我们。现在，为了所有人的命运，我们必须团结一致。

effects.description: Increases the effect of both bonuses in Asharra's Paragon of Kir Sabal upgrade by $amount%. Asharra also counts as a Druid.

description.original: The tip isn't as fragile as it looks.
description.display: 矛头没有想象中的那么脆弱。

description.original: Crafted by the finest Aarakocra smiths in Kir Sabal.
description.display: 这是由克萨巴尔最优秀的翼爪鸟人匠人所铸造而成的。

description.original: Imbued with magical power by the wizards of Kir Sabal.
description.display: 由克萨巴尔的法师们附魔过的长矛。

name.original: Ornate Jade Spear of the Mind

description.original: The finest spear I've seen in all my years protecting the skies of Chult.
description.display: 我守护了楚尔特的天空这么多年还是第一次见到如此精良的长矛。

description.original: This orb causes the air around you to shift and swirl.
description.display: 此法珠能够让你感觉到微风拂面。

description.original: This orb causes the air around you to gust and blow your robes.
description.display: 此法珠能够让你感到身边凉风习习。

description.original: This orb causes a strong wind to swirl past you, making footing difficult.
description.display: 此法珠能够让你感到身边狂风大作，寸步难移。

description.original: Without proper discipline, this orb could cause you to be swept off your feet.
description.display: 此法珠能够让没有经过训练的人瞬间被暴风卷起。

description.original: This robe has clearly seen better days.
description.display: 此长袍明显长时间使用过。

description.original: This robe fits perfectly, and flutters about pleasingly as you fly.
description.display: 此长袍非常合身，而且会在你飞行时随风飘扬。

description.original: A golden robe with light colors and brilliant golden cloud motifs.
description.display: 印画着鲜艳色彩的黄金云朵图案的黄金长袍。

description.original: This robe seems to have a mind of its own, swirling about you even when the wind is calm.
description.display: 这长袍似乎拥有自己的思维，即使在无风时也会围着你自行旋转。

description.original: A simple pouch for storing spell components and trinkets.
description.display: 用来存放法术器材和小饰品的简易小袋子。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%.

description.original: Twice the storage potential compared to single pouches!
description.display: 比单袋小袋子多一倍的容纳空间！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%.

description.original: A well loved pouch that I'd guess belonged to a lesser Aarakocra priest or cleric.
description.display: 我猜测这是某位翼爪鸟人牧师或祭祀心爱的小袋。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%.

description.original: The components for nearly any spell you could imagine can be found in these pouches.
description.display: 这个袋子里存放着几乎所有法术所需用到的材料。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%.

description.original: A common necklace worn by the Aarakocra residents of Kir Sabal.
description.display: 克萨巴尔的翼爪鸟人居民常佩戴的项链。

description.original: This necklace has seen combat, but is still holding together well. It must be lucky!
description.display: 此项链经历过多次战斗，但依然相对完好无损。真是幸运星！

description.original: This fine necklace obviously belonged to a powerful Aarakocra at some point in the past.
description.display: 这条项链明显曾经属于某位强大的翼爪鸟人英雄的。

description.original: The craftsmanship on this necklace puts all others to shame.
description.display: 这条项链的精湛做工足以让其他项链相形见绌。

description.original: A simple armlet, but good enough for the time being.
description.display: 简易的护臂，目前可以凑合着用。

description.original: A well loved armlet that its previous owner obviously adored.
description.display: 其前任主人明显很珍爱它。

description.original: A shiny armlet with what looks like a small citrine or amber set in it.
description.display: 这个闪亮的护臂上镶嵌着一颗黄水晶或琥珀宝石。

description.original: A beautiful golden armlet set with a shining fire opal.
description.display: 美轮美奂的黄金护臂，上头镶嵌着一颗闪闪发亮的火蛋白石。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Aarakocra Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a WIS score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a LAWFUL alignment

character_sheet_details.backstory: The elder of Kir Sabal, Asharra is a stern and honorable aarakocra wizard who looks over her flock and the safety of the Omu royal family.
身为克萨巴尔的长老，艾萨拉是一位严厉而可敬的翼爪鸟人法师，她维护着她的族群和奥穆王室的安全。

display.name: 纽带：异域种族
display.specialization_description: 艾萨拉与队伍中的神裔、狂蛙人、变形怪、元素裔、吉夫人、吉斯人、巨人、兔人、卡拉史塔人、爬虫人、斑猫人、机关人及蛇人勇士结成友谊纽带，使其伤害提高。
display.tip_text: 艾萨拉与神裔、元素裔、吉斯人、巨人、爬虫人、斑猫人、机关人及蛇人勇士结成友谊纽带，专注于使其成为主要伤害输出者。

original.name: Bond: Short-folk
original.specialization_description: Asharra forms a bond of friendship with any Fairy, Gnome, Goblin, Halfling, Kender, Kobold, NERDS, and Plasmoid champions in your party, increasing their damage.
original.tip_text: Asharra has formed a bond of friendship with your Fairy, Gnome, Goblin, Halfling, Kender, Kobold, NERDS, and Plasmoid champions. Focus on having those champions as your main damage dealers.

display.name: 纽带：小人族
display.specialization_description: 艾萨拉与你队伍中的任何侏儒、地精、仙女、半身人、坎德人、呆宝们和等离子勇士建立友谊羁绊，增加他们的伤害。
display.tip_text: 艾萨拉与你的仙女、侏儒、地精、半身人、坎德人、呆宝人、狗头人和等离子冠军们结下了友谊。让这些勇士成为你的主要伤害输出者吧。

original.name: Adept
original.description: My enemies will rue the day they met me.

display.name: 熟练
display.description: 我的敌人将为遇到我而后悔。

original.name: Elementalist
original.description: The fate of Kir Sabal is in my hands.

display.name: 元素使
display.description: 克萨巴尔的命运就在我的手中。

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: I feel a special bond with you.

display.name: 无私
display.description: 我感到和你有种特殊的联系。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: My people follow me. Will you?

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 我的人民会追随我，你会吗？

original.name: Actor
original.description: I can be quite persuasive.

display.name: 演员
display.description: 我可以相当能言善辩。

original.name: Bonds of Kir Sabal
original.description: Take flight, friends!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%.

display.name: 克萨巴尔的束缚
display.description: 快跑吧，朋友！

effects.description: 使艾萨拉的“纽带”类技能的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Spell Master
original.description: Icewind Dale needs protectors!

display.name: 法术大师
display.description: 冰风谷需要守护者！

original.name: Prodigal Leader
original.description: I'll provide air cover.

display.name: 浪荡首领
display.description: 我会提供空中掩护。

original.name: Teacher of Kir Sabal
original.description: My ancestors watch over us. We must stand together now, for the fate of all.

effects.description: Increases the effect of both bonuses in Asharra's Paragon of Kir Sabal upgrade by $amount%. Asharra also counts as a Druid.

display.name: 克萨巴尔的导师
display.description: 我们的祖先守护着我们。现在，为了所有人的命运，我们必须团结一致。

effects.description: 使艾萨拉的“克萨巴尔的楷模”进阶中的两项加成效果均提升 $amount%。艾萨拉也算作一名德鲁伊。

original.name: Simple Jade Spear
original.description: The tip isn't as fragile as it looks.

display.name: 简单的翡翠长矛
display.description: 矛头没有想象中的那么脆弱。

original.name: Sharp Jade Spear
original.description: Crafted by the finest Aarakocra smiths in Kir Sabal.

display.name: 尖锐的翡翠长矛
display.description: 这是由克萨巴尔最优秀的翼爪鸟人匠人所铸造而成的。

original.name: Magical Jade Spear
original.description: Imbued with magical power by the wizards of Kir Sabal.

display.name: 魔法翡翠长矛
display.description: 由克萨巴尔的法师们附魔过的长矛。

original.name: Ornate Jade Spear of the Mind
original.description: The finest spear I've seen in all my years protecting the skies of Chult.

display.name: 华丽的宁神翡翠长矛
display.description: 我守护了楚尔特的天空这么多年还是第一次见到如此精良的长矛。

original.name: Orb of Breezes
original.description: This orb causes the air around you to shift and swirl.

display.name: 微风法珠
display.description: 此法珠能够让你感觉到微风拂面。

original.name: Orb of Gusts
original.description: This orb causes the air around you to gust and blow your robes.

display.name: 阵风法珠
display.description: 此法珠能够让你感到身边凉风习习。

original.name: Orb of Squalls
original.description: This orb causes a strong wind to swirl past you, making footing difficult.

display.name: 狂风法珠
display.description: 此法珠能够让你感到身边狂风大作，寸步难移。

original.name: Hurricane Orb of Storms
original.description: Without proper discipline, this orb could cause you to be swept off your feet.

display.name: 暴风法珠
display.description: 此法珠能够让没有经过训练的人瞬间被暴风卷起。

original.name: Pilling Robe
original.description: This robe has clearly seen better days.

display.name: 起球的长袍
display.description: 此长袍明显长时间使用过。

original.name: Long Robe
original.description: This robe fits perfectly, and flutters about pleasingly as you fly.

display.name: 长袍
display.description: 此长袍非常合身，而且会在你飞行时随风飘扬。

original.name: Golden Robe
original.description: A golden robe with light colors and brilliant golden cloud motifs.

display.name: 黄金长袍
display.description: 印画着鲜艳色彩的黄金云朵图案的黄金长袍。

original.name: Swirling Robe of Gusting Wind
original.description: This robe seems to have a mind of its own, swirling about you even when the wind is calm.

display.name: 阵风旋涡长袍
display.description: 这长袍似乎拥有自己的思维，即使在无风时也会围着你自行旋转。

original.name: Simple Pouch
original.description: A simple pouch for storing spell components and trinkets.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%.

display.name: 简单的小袋
display.description: 用来存放法术器材和小饰品的简易小袋子。

effects.description: 使艾萨拉的“纽带”类技能的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Dual Cloth Pouches
original.description: Twice the storage potential compared to single pouches!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%.

display.name: 双袋布袋
display.description: 比单袋小袋子多一倍的容纳空间！

effects.description: 使艾萨拉的“纽带”类技能的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Hardened Leather Pouch
original.description: A well loved pouch that I'd guess belonged to a lesser Aarakocra priest or cleric.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%.

display.name: 硬化的皮袋
display.description: 我猜测这是某位翼爪鸟人牧师或祭祀心爱的小袋。

effects.description: 使艾萨拉的“纽带”类技能的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Bottomless Pouch of Components
original.description: The components for nearly any spell you could imagine can be found in these pouches.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Asharra's Bond abilities by $(amount)%.

display.name: 无底材料小袋
display.description: 这个袋子里存放着几乎所有法术所需用到的材料。

effects.description: 使艾萨拉的“纽带”类技能的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Common Aarakocra Necklace
original.description: A common necklace worn by the Aarakocra residents of Kir Sabal.

display.name: 普通的翼爪鸟人项链
display.description: 克萨巴尔的翼爪鸟人居民常佩戴的项链。

original.name: Scuffed Aarakocra Necklace
original.description: This necklace has seen combat, but is still holding together well. It must be lucky!

display.name: 磨损的翼爪鸟人项链
display.description: 此项链经历过多次战斗，但依然相对完好无损。真是幸运星！

original.name: Jeweled Aarakocra Necklace
original.description: This fine necklace obviously belonged to a powerful Aarakocra at some point in the past.

display.name: 翼爪鸟人宝石项链
display.description: 这条项链明显曾经属于某位强大的翼爪鸟人英雄的。

original.name: Masterfully Crafted Aarakocra Necklace
original.description: The craftsmanship on this necklace puts all others to shame.

display.name: 大师级翼爪鸟人项链
display.description: 这条项链的精湛做工足以让其他项链相形见绌。

original.name: Brass Armlet
original.description: A simple armlet, but good enough for the time being.

display.name: 黄铜护臂
display.description: 简易的护臂，目前可以凑合着用。

original.name: Polished Armlet
original.description: A well loved armlet that its previous owner obviously adored.

display.name: 磨光的护臂
display.description: 其前任主人明显很珍爱它。

original.name: Jeweled Copper Armlet
original.description: A shiny armlet with what looks like a small citrine or amber set in it.

display.name: 宝石红铜护臂
display.description: 这个闪亮的护臂上镶嵌着一颗黄水晶或琥珀宝石。

original.name: Magnificent Golden Armlet of Focus
original.description: A beautiful golden armlet set with a shining fire opal.

display.name: 专注之高贵黄金护臂
display.description: 美轮美奂的黄金护臂，上头镶嵌着一颗闪闪发亮的火蛋白石。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位女性勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Aarakocra Champions by $(amount)%
使所有翼爪鸟人勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有魅力大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a WIS score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有感知大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a LAWFUL alignment
阵型中每有一位守序阵营勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
